title: Labor Day Weekend
note: Work holiday Sep 7 + school off. Free long weekend.

title: MLK Weekend
note: School off Jan 18, work holiday Jan 19. Free 4-day weekend.

title: Presidents' Day Stretch
note: School non-work day Feb 12, Presidents’ Day Feb 15, work holiday Feb 16. Best free stretch.

title: Memorial Day + Last Day
note: Work holiday May 31 + school ends Jun 1. Summer kickoff.

title: Fall Recess
note: School off Nov 23–27. Work covers Thanksgiving + day after. 2 PTO days = 10-day stretch.

title: Winter Break (minimal)
note: 1 PTO day (Dec 19 head start). School off Dec 21–Jan 4. Work covers Dec 24, 25 & 31.

title: Winter Break (full dark)
note: 6 PTO days — fully offline both work weeks. Work covers Dec 24, 25 & 31.

title: Spring Break
note: School off Mar 15–19. No work holidays — most PTO-expensive week. Use choice days here.

title: Summer Trip
note: School fully out. Juneteenth Jun 18 is a free work holiday at the end. Best window for a big trip.
